site.name: BitRemote
site.description: An Apple platforms app to control your downloaders remotely.

hero.subhead: Built for iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Manage download tasks and monitor activity — wherever you are.

items.title: Diverse Client Support
items.subtitle: Seamlessly integrate with popular download tools including {clients}.

items.title: Comprehensive Task Management
items.subtitle: Easily control your downloads with options to pause, resume, delete tasks, and add new ones on the fly.

items.title: Smart Filtering & Sorting
items.subtitle: Organize downloads by status, category, or tag, and sort by various criteria for efficiency.

items.title: Activity Monitor
items.subtitle: Monitor real-time statistics and transfer history happening on your client.

items.title: Clients Backup & Restore
items.subtitle: Export and import clients with a unified JSON format, ensuring seamless transfers across app versions.

items.title: Optional Certificate Evaluation
items.subtitle: Option to bypass certificate evaluation for client hosts, enabling connections to servers with self-signed certificates.

quickstart.title: How it works

steps.title: Install
steps.body: Get BitRemote on the App Store.

steps.title: Control
steps.body: Monitor and manage tasks from your Apple devices.

quickstart.requirements: Requires iOS / iPadOS / macOS 26.0 or later.

plus.title: Pricing
plus.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your setup.
plus.note: $1.99 per month, $9.99 per year, or $49.99 for a one-time purchase plan.

items.q: Do I need to be on the same network?
items.a: It depends on your setup. Many users connect over LAN, VPN, or a secure remote access method provided by their environment.

items.q: Does BitRemote download files on my device?
items.a: No. BitRemote controls and monitors your existing downloader clients.

Your client credentials are never uploaded to our servers, so we cannot access them. However, credentials are not encrypted on-device. If you use BitRemote on a jailbroken device, your client credentials may be compromised.

home.title: BitRemote | Remote Download Manager for NAS and Home Server Tasks
home.description: Remote download manager for iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Control aria2, qBittorrent, Transmission, Synology Download Station, and QNAP Download Station from anywhere.

support.title: BitRemote Support | Help, Community, and GitHub
support.description: Get BitRemote support, report bugs, request features, and join the community for the remote download manager app for iPhone, iPad, and Mac.

privacy.title: BitRemote Privacy Policy | Ark Studios
privacy.description: Read the official BitRemote privacy policy from Ark Studios for the remote download manager app used with NAS and downloader clients.

terms.title: BitRemote EULA | Ark Studios
terms.description: Read the BitRemote end user license agreement from Ark Studios for the remote downloader management app on Apple platforms.

languageSelector.title: BitRemote | Remote Download Manager App
languageSelector.description: Choose your language to learn about BitRemote, the remote download manager app for NAS, seedbox, and home server workflows on Apple devices.
